title: Check Official Sources Before Making Visa Decisions
subtitle: Some immigration updates may change or apply only to specific visa types, jobs, cities, or household situations.
bullets: Confirm the original notice before applying.
Check whether the rule applies to your visa type.
Ask an official office if the information is unclear.
llama_rule: Keep the title caution-oriented but calm.
Do not use panic, emergency, or sensational wording.
Use this template for sensitive, incomplete, source-limited, or review-required information.
Do not include system or operation messages.
